	"SQL_CONDITIONS" CLOB, 
	"SOURCE_TABLE_CONDITIONS" VARCHAR2(100), 
	"IS_DELETED" NUMBER(1,0), 
	"CREATED_BY" VARCHAR2(100), 
	"CREATED_DATE" DATE, 
	"UPDATED_BY" VARCHAR2(100), 
	"UPDATED_DATE" DATE
   ) SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE 
  PCTFREE 10 PCTUSED 40 INITRANS 1 MAXTRANS 255 
 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "USERS" 
 LOB ("SQL_CONDITIONS") STORE AS SECUREFILE (
  TABLESPACE "USERS" ENABLE STORAGE IN ROW CHUNK 8192
  NOCACHE LOGGING  NOCOMPRESS  KEEP_DUPLICATES 
  STORAGE(INITIAL 262144 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)) ;

   (	"PKID" NUMBER(10,0) GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER  NOCYCLE  NOKEEP  NOSCALE  NOT NULL ENABLE,

	"USED" NUMBER(32,6),

	 CONSTRAINT "PK_IFRS_TRX_FACILITY" PRIMARY KEY ("PKID", "TRX_EFFDATE", "TRX_FACILITY_NO", "TRX_CODE", "TRX_DR_CR", "TRX_CCY")
  USING INDEX PCTFREE 10 INITRANS 2 MAXTRANS 255 COMPUTE STATISTICS 
  TABLESPACE "USERS"  ENABLE
   ) SEGMENT CREATION DEFERRED

-- PSAK413.IMA definition

   (	"DOWNLOAD_DATE" DATE, 
	"MASTERID" NVARCHAR2(100), 
	"CUSTOMER_NUMBER" NVARCHAR2(50),

	"PLAFOND_IDR" NUMBER(30,10),

   ) SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE 
  PCTFREE 10 PCTUSED 40 INITRANS 1 MAXTRANS 255 
 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "USERS" 
 LOB ("FACILITY_NUMBER") STORE AS SECUREFILE (
  TABLESPACE "USERS" ENABLE STORAGE IN ROW CHUNK 8192
  NOCACHE LOGGING  NOCOMPRESS  KEEP_DUPLICATES 
  STORAGE(INITIAL 262144 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)) 
 LOB ("BUSINESS_UNIT") STORE AS SECUREFILE (

  PCTINCREASE 0
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)) ;

	"CREATEDDATE" DATE DEFAULT TO_DATE('2025-10-06 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"CREATEDHOST" NVARCHAR2(30) DEFAULT 'LOCALHOST' NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"UPDATEDBY" NVARCHAR2(36),

	"UPDATEDHOST" NVARCHAR2(30)
   ) SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE

 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING

-- PSAK413.PSAK_LOGS_PROCESS definition

CREATE TABLE "PSAK413"."PSAK_LOGS_PROCESS" 
   (	"PKID" NUMBER(20,0) GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER  NOCYCLE  NOKEEP  NOSCALE  NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"DOWNLOAD_DATE" DATE, 
	"TABLE_DEST" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"COLUMN_DEST" NCLOB NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"SP_NAME" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"OPERATION" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"RUN_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"PROCESS_ID" NUMBER(20,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"AFFECTED_RECORD" NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"PROCESS_DATE" TIMESTAMP (8)
   ) SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE 
  PCTFREE 10 PCTUSED 40 INITRANS 1 MAXTRANS 255 
 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "USERS" 
 LOB ("COLUMN_DEST") STORE AS SECUREFILE (
  TABLESPACE "USERS" ENABLE STORAGE IN ROW CHUNK 8192
  NOCACHE LOGGING  NOCOMPRESS  KEEP_DUPLICATES 
  STORAGE(INITIAL 262144 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)) ;

CREATE OR REPLACE EDITIONABLE TRIGGER "PSAK413"."TRG_PSAK_PD_MAA_FLOWRATE_PK" 
BEFORE INSERT ON PSAK_PD_MAA_FLOWRATE
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
    IF :NEW.PKID IS NULL THEN
        :NEW.PKID := SEQ_PSAK_PD_MAA_FLOWRATE.NEXTVAL;
    END IF;
END;
/
ALTER TRIGGER "PSAK413"."TRG_PSAK_PD_MAA_FLOWRATE_PK" ENABLE;

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "PSAK413"."PK_PSAK_PD_MAA_FLOWRATE" ON "PSAK413"."PSAK_PD_MAA_FLOWRATE" ("PKID") 
  PCTFREE 10 INITRANS 2 MAXTRANS 255 COMPUTE STATISTICS 
  TABLESPACE "USERS" ;

-- PSAK413.TBLU_DCF_INFO definition

CREATE TABLE "PSAK413"."TBLU_DCF_INFO" 
   (	"UPLOADID" NUMBER(20,0) GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER  NOCYCLE  NOKEEP  NOSCALE  NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"DCFID" NUMBER(20,0), 
	"MASTERID" NUMBER(20,0), 
	"ACCOUNT_NUMBER" NVARCHAR2(50), 
	"CUSTOMER_NUMBER" NVARCHAR2(50), 
	"FACILITY_NUMBER" NVARCHAR2(50), 
	"FILEPATH" NCLOB, 
	"METHOD" NVARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"STATUS" NVARCHAR2(20), 
	"CREATEDBY" NVARCHAR2(36) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"CREATEDDATE" TIMESTAMP (8), 
	"CREATEDHOST" NVARCHAR2(30) NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"UPDATEDBY" NVARCHAR2(36), 
	"UPDATEDDATE" DATE, 
	"UPDATEDHOST" NVARCHAR2(30)
   ) SEGMENT CREATION DEFERRED 
  PCTFREE 10 PCTUSED 40 INITRANS 1 MAXTRANS 255 
 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING
  TABLESPACE "USERS" 
 LOB ("FILEPATH") STORE AS SECUREFILE (
  TABLESPACE "USERS" ENABLE STORAGE IN ROW CHUNK 8192
  NOCACHE LOGGING  NOCOMPRESS  KEEP_DUPLICATES ) ;

-- PSAK413.TBLU_TRANS_ASSET definition

CREATE TABLE "PSAK413"."TBLU_TRANS_ASSET" 
   (	"PKID" NUMBER(20,0) GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER  NOCYCLE  NOKEEP  NOSCALE  NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"DOWNLOAD_DATE" NVARCHAR2(20),

-- PSAK413.TMP_QRY definition

CREATE TABLE "PSAK413"."TMP_QRY" 
   (	"RN" NUMBER(20,0), 
	"QRY" NCLOB
   ) SEGMENT CREATION IMMEDIATE 
  PCTFREE 10 PCTUSED 40 INITRANS 1 MAXTRANS 255 
 NOCOMPRESS LOGGING
  STORAGE(INITIAL 65536 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0 FREELISTS 1 FREELIST GROUPS 1
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)
  TABLESPACE "USERS" 
 LOB ("QRY") STORE AS SECUREFILE (
  TABLESPACE "USERS" ENABLE STORAGE IN ROW CHUNK 8192
  NOCACHE LOGGING  NOCOMPRESS  KEEP_DUPLICATES 
  STORAGE(INITIAL 262144 NEXT 1048576 MINEXTENTS 1 MAXEXTENTS 2147483645
  PCTINCREASE 0
  BUFFER_POOL DEFAULT FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT CELL_FLASH_CACHE DEFAULT)) ;

   ) SEGMENT CREATION DEFERRED

	"IS_DELETED" NUMBER(1,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE,

	"CREATEDDATE" DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE NOT NULL ENABLE, 
	"CREATEDHOST" VARCHAR2(36) DEFAULT 'LOCALHOST' NOT NULL ENABLE,
